component.name: TestScene
component.script:
sub init() m.lib = m.top.findNode("MyLib") print "init loadStatus: " + m.lib.loadStatus m.lib.observeField("loadStatus", "onLoadStatusChanged") end sub
sub onLoadStatusChanged() print "loadStatus changed: " + m.lib.loadStatus if m.lib.loadStatus = "ready" ' Namespace comes from the library manifest (sg_component_libs_provided), ' not the node id ("MyLib"). bar = createObject("roSGNode", "MyComponentLib:Bar") print "bar subtype: " + bar.subtype() print "bar message: " + bar.message end if end sub
